page_metadata.biotools__summary: Linkprep create LINKAGE style .pre and .dat files from AGRF style data. This creates standard format input files for linkage analysis software from human genotyping data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Linkprep create LINKAGE style .pre and .dat files from AGRF style data. This creates standard format input files for linkage analysis software from human genotyping data.
